login.title: Staff Login
login.description: Sign in with your work email to continue.
login.errorLocked: This account is locked. Contact your administrator.
login.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.

setPassword.title: Set your password
setPassword.description: Before entering the portal, choose a password for your account.
setPassword.errorWeak: Password must be at least 12 characters.
setPassword.errorUnknown: We could not update your password. Try again.

notStarted.title: Employment not yet started
notStarted.description: Your account will activate on your contract start date. Contact HR for questions.

accessRevoked.title: Access revoked
accessRevoked.description: This account has been locked. Contact your administrator to restore access.

onLeave.title: On leave — view only
onLeave.description: You can browse dashboards and announcements while on leave. Mutations are disabled.

admin.description: Your admin overview will appear here.
admin.commandHint: Press ⌘K to search routes and actions.

management.description: Pick a domain from the sidebar to get started.
management.noDomain: Your account has no assigned management domains yet.

crew.attendancePlaceholder: Attendance page will be available in a later phase.
crew.readOnlyNotice: You are on leave — mutations are disabled.

errors.validationFailed: Please review your answers and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.internal: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: We can't process this request from here.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.dependencyFailed: A required service is unavailable. Please try again shortly.

book.title: Book your visit
book.metaDescription: Reserve a slot at AgarthaOS — pick a tier, date, time, and confirm in minutes.

empty.noExperienceBody: There's no active experience configured right now. Please check back soon — we're getting things ready.
empty.noTiersBody: The experience exists, but no tiers have been published yet. Please check back soon.

plan.title: Pick your tier and party size
plan.subtitle: Pricing updates as you change guests.
plan.noTiersAvailableBody: Check back soon — we're configuring the experience.

date.title: Pick a date
date.subtitle: We open booking up to 14 days ahead.

time.title: Pick a time
time.subtitle: Times shown in your facility's local time.
time.loadErrorRateLimited: You're picking dates quickly — wait a moment and try again.
time.loadErrorGeneric: Couldn't load slots. Please try again.
time.noSlots: No slots available on this date.

details.title: Your details
details.subtitle: We'll send your booking confirmation to this email.

review.title: Review your booking
review.subtitle: We'll hold your slot for 15 minutes after you confirm.
review.termsAck: I agree to the Terms and have read the Privacy notice.
review.submitErrorGeneric: Couldn't complete the booking. Please try again.

payment.metaDescription: Finalise your AgarthaOS booking by completing payment.
payment.headlineExpired: We held it as long as we could
payment.idleBody: We've held your slot for 15 minutes. Continue to our payment partner to confirm your booking — you'll be brought back here once it's done.
payment.trustRow: Encrypted payment · We never see your card details.
payment.successEmail: We've emailed your QR code to {email}.
payment.failureCopy: No charge was made. Your slot is still held — try again or use a different payment method.
payment.expiredCopy: We hold slots for 15 minutes. Pick a new time — your seat may still be available.
payment.pollingHint: This usually takes a few seconds. Please don't close this tab.
payment.pollingTimeoutHint: Your payment is still being processed. Refresh in a moment, or check My booking — we'll email your QR code as soon as it confirms.
payment.pendingFallback: Payments are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
payment.notFoundBody: The link may have expired. If you've already paid, sign in via 'My booking' to view your QR code.

lookup.metaDescription: Look up your AgarthaOS booking by reference.
lookup.title: Find your booking
lookup.subtitle: Enter the reference from your confirmation email. We'll email a one-time code so you can manage attendees, view your QR, and revisit your memories.
lookup.helpBody: Your reference is in the booking confirmation email — search for "AG-". If you can't find it, email hello@agartha.example with the address you booked under.
lookup.footnote: We'll email a 6-digit code to the address on the booking. The code expires in 5 minutes.

verify.metaDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we just emailed you to access your booking.
verify.title: Enter your code
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to <email>{maskedEmail}</email>. Enter it below to access booking <ref>{bookingRef}</ref>.
verify.resendSentBody: We've emailed a fresh code to {maskedEmail}.
verify.errorInvalid: That code didn't match. Try again.
verify.errorExpired: That code expired. Please request a new one.
verify.errorLocked: Too many wrong attempts. Please request a new code.
verify.errorGeneric: Couldn't verify the code. Please try again.

manage.metaDescription: View your QR code, manage attendees, and reschedule your AgarthaOS visit.
manage.title: Your booking
manage.rescheduleClosedBody: We close changes {hours} hours before entry. The team can help at the gate.
manage.rescheduleAvailableBody: Free until {hours} hours before entry. Tier and guests stay the same.
manage.biometricsBody: Optional — pay with a glance and have your photos saved automatically.
manage.feedbackBody: A minute of feedback helps us improve for the next guests.
manage.attendeesHint: Tap any attendee to add a nickname or toggle Face Pay & Auto-capture intent.
manage.cancelledBody: Editing is disabled. If this is unexpected, contact us at the gate.

ticketHero.label: Show this at the gate
ticketHero.qrFooter: Scan at the gate, or read the reference to a staff member.

actions.calendarToastBody: Open the .ics file to add it to your calendar.

manageCard.title: Manage your visit
manageCard.rescheduleHint: Move your slot up to 2 hours before entry.
manageCard.biometricsHint: Set up biometric features for your visit.
manageCard.memoriesHint: View and download photos from your visit.

attendees.title: Attendees
attendees.subtitle: Set nicknames and feature preferences for everyone in your party.
attendees.facePayDescBio: Approves in-park purchases via face recognition.
attendees.autoCaptureDescBio: Automatically saves photos taken of this attendee.

reschedule.title: Move your booking
reschedule.subtitle: Pick a new date, then a time. We'll only change the time — your tier and guests stay the same.
reschedule.slotsErrorBody: Couldn't load slots — please try again.

errors.tooLate: Reschedules close 2 hours before your entry time.
errors.sameSlot: That's already your current slot — pick a different time.
errors.slotFull: That slot just sold out — please pick another time.
errors.facilityFull: The facility is full at that time — please pick another slot.
errors.promoDayInvalid: Your promo code isn't valid on that day.
errors.promoTimeInvalid: Your promo code isn't valid at that time.

biometrics.metaDescription: Manage Face Pay enrolment, consent, and audit history for each attendee on your booking.
biometrics.title: Face Pay & privacy
biometrics.subtitle: Decide per attendee whether AgarthaOS may process a face template for Face Pay and Auto-capture during your visit. Read the disclosure below, then grant consent for each person you'd like to enrol.
biometrics.emptyTitle: No attendees on this booking yet.
biometrics.emptyBody: Once attendees are configured, they'll appear here for individual consent decisions.
biometrics.retentionFootnote: Templates auto-delete 24 hours after your visit ends, or immediately on withdrawal. Withdrawal does not affect your booking.
biometrics.disclosureSubtitle: What we capture, why, retention & your right to withdraw — required reading.
biometrics.disclosureBody: Biometric vectors are stored encrypted, used only inside the facility, and deleted 24 hours after your visit ends. You can withdraw consent at any time.
biometrics.withdrawConfirmBody: Your biometric data will be deleted immediately. You can opt back in any time.
biometrics.noEnrolment: Biometric enrolment opens during your visit.
biometrics.disclosureIntro: Face Pay and Auto-capture rely on a face template — a mathematical fingerprint derived from a photo. We need your explicit consent before we process it. If anything is unclear, contact {email} before consenting.

disclosureItems.captureBody: A mathematical template derived from a photo of the face — never the photo itself. The raw image is discarded the moment the template is extracted.
disclosureItems.purposeBody: To authorise in-park purchases via Face Pay, and (optionally) to auto-save photos taken of you during your visit.
disclosureItems.legalBody: Explicit consent under GDPR Art. 9(2)(a), BIPA §15 written release, and PDPA Sec. 6. We only process this data because you say we may.
disclosureItems.retentionBody: The template is automatically deleted 24 hours after your visit ends, or immediately when you withdraw consent — whichever comes first.
disclosureItems.withdrawBody: Withdraw any time, on this page. Withdrawal is immediate, deletes your template, and does NOT affect your booking.
disclosureItems.controllerBody: AgarthaOS Sdn Bhd · Privacy contact {email} · Policy version {version}

biometrics.previouslyWithdrawnBody: Your previous consent was withdrawn on {date}. You can re-consent below if you've changed your mind.
biometrics.consentCheckboxLabel: I have read the disclosure above and consent to AgarthaOS processing a face template for <name>{label}</name> for the purposes of Face Pay and Auto-capture, retained until 24 hours after this visit.
biometrics.grantSavedBodyNew: {label}: you can enrol on the day of your visit.
biometrics.grantReusedBody: {label}: your existing consent is still active.
biometrics.withdrawSuccessBody: {label}: face template deleted; Face Pay and Auto-capture are off.
biometrics.enrolmentEnrolledBody: Your face template is on file. Tap Face Pay at any point-of-sale during your visit.
biometrics.enrolmentPendingBody: We'll capture the face template at the gate when you arrive — no extra step needed here.

withdrawConfirmAck.templateDeleted: Your face template (if enrolled) is deleted from our systems.
withdrawConfirmAck.featuresOff: Face Pay and Auto-capture are turned off for this attendee.
withdrawConfirmAck.bookingUnaffected: Your booking is unaffected — you'll still enter and enjoy your visit.
withdrawConfirmAck.canReConsent: You can re-consent on this page at any time.

biometrics.withdrawConfirmDescription: This is immediate and undoable from this page.
biometrics.auditMatchAttempts: {count, plural, one {# match attempt} other {# match attempts}}
biometrics.auditEmpty: No activity yet. Once enrolled, every read of your template is logged here.

memories.metaDescription: View and download photos from your AgarthaOS visit.
memories.title: Your memories
memories.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No photos yet} one {# photo} other {# photos}} from {date}. Available until {expiry} — download anything you'd like to keep.
memories.shareCopyDescription: Anyone with this link can view it for the next {minutes} min.
memories.paginationLabel: Page {page} of {total} · {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}}
memories.photoBroken: Couldn't load this photo. Refresh the page.

empty.preVisitTitle: Your photos will appear here after your visit.
empty.preVisitBody: Auto-captured photos show up the moment they're taken — make sure Face Pay is set up for the people you'd like to be tagged.
empty.noOptInTitle: Auto-capture wasn't on for any attendee.
empty.noOptInBody: Photos are only captured when an enrolled attendee passes a capture point with Auto-capture enabled. You can turn it on for next time from the booking page.
empty.noPhotosTitle: We didn't catch any moments this visit.
empty.noPhotosBody: Auto-capture only triggers when an enrolled attendee passes a capture point. Try saying hi at the gate next time.

survey.metaTitle: Tell us about your visit · AgarthaOS
survey.metaDescription: Share feedback on your AgarthaOS visit. It takes about a minute and helps us improve.
survey.title: Tell us about your visit
survey.subtitle: It takes about a minute. Only the first question is required — the rest are bonus.

q1.title: How was your visit?
q1.subtitle: Required · pick a number from 0 to 10

q2.title: How likely are you to recommend us?
q2.subtitle: Optional · 0–10 scale

q4.title: Anything else?
q4.subtitle: Optional · what made it great, what we could improve
q4.placeholder: Tell us in your own words…

survey.pickRatingHelper: Pick a rating in the first question to send.

confirmation.title: Thank you — your feedback is in.
confirmation.body: We read every response. The team will use it to improve the experience for the next guests.

errors.rateLimited: We've already received feedback from your network recently. Please try again in a little while.
errors.validation: Please review your answers and try again.
errors.generic: We couldn't send your feedback. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: How we handle your data at AgarthaOS.

terms.title: Terms
terms.intro: The terms governing your AgarthaOS booking.
